---
title: "Insecticides evaluation"
image: ../content/img/test_bouteille.png
description: "Test of new type of insecticides and repellents against Anopheles gambiae"
categories: [Dose response, GLM, survival model, Vector]
---


## Insecticides evaluation

**Context**  
Test of new type of insecticides on mosquitoes mortality  

**Objectives**  
- Choose of lethal dose (LD) 50 and 90 for different mosquitoes strains (different mutation conferring partial resistance to insecticides)

**Methods**  

- Dose response 

- Survival model : Kaplan meier curves and cox

- Generalized linear models  

**Tools**  
- R (tidyverse, ggplot2, dplyr, glmmTMB, DHARMa, coxme, survival, drm, BioRssay)

**Key Results**  
- Identification of efficient dose for 2 news type of insecticides.   

**Impact**  
Support for development of news control vector tools by a private company.
